body:
language = "C"
header = "/* Generated by cbindgen — do not edit manually. */"
include_guard = "FFS_C_H"
include_version = true
no_includes = true
sys_includes = ["stdint.h", "stdbool.h", "stddef.h"]

[export]
include = [
  "FfsResult",
  "FfsSearchResult", "FfsFileItem", "FfsScore", "FfsLocation",
  "FfsGrepResult", "FfsGrepMatch", "FfsMatchRange",
  "FfsScanProgress",
]

[export.rename]
"FfsResult" = "FfsResult"
"FfsSearchResult" = "FfsSearchResult"
"FfsFileItem" = "FfsFileItem"
"FfsScore" = "FfsScore"
"FfsLocation" = "FfsLocation"
"FfsGrepResult" = "FfsGrepResult"
"FfsGrepMatch" = "FfsGrepMatch"
"FfsMatchRange" = "FfsMatchRange"
"FfsScanProgress" = "FfsScanProgress"

[fn]
sort_by = "None"
